subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! Thy services at the threshold of the Incomparable Lord have been graciously accepted, for in service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان خدماتت در آستان حضرت بیچون مقرون بقبول گردید زیرا بخدمت
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @wisdom [hikmat]
